name: insurance brokers managing 5–15 policies/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 5–15 policies/month, manual tracking causes late alerts to clients. We provide automated monitoring instead of manual tracking of policy limits through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Risk managers are unaware of policy limit breaches until it's too late.
features: alert system for policy limit breaches
